name: Singularity Grenade
description:
Creates a brief singularity that drags nearby foes towards the point of impact, then detonates. Strong crowd control against groups, especially when paired with splash-damage weapons.

Typically not found in the very early game.
notes:
You are not affected by the initial pull, but the final blast can still damage you.

Pull strength drops off with distance, and heavier enemies are less affected. Even when the blast does not catch everyone, the suction can interrupt or stagger enemies long enough to escape or reposition.

The pull can drag enemies over ledges or into hazards.

In Borderlands 3, Singularity appears as a grenade mod payload.

The effect is themed around a gravitational singularity.

special.description: Forms a singularity just before detonation, pulling nearby enemies inward.
